query:
INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, content)
VALUES (
  'GOV-DOMAIN-BREAK-002',
  'DOMAIN-BREAK-002 — Unauthorised Domain Change: Full Impact Chain',
  'incident_report',
  'active',
  'B412',
  '{"classification":"CRITICAL","incident":"AI agent (Manus) recreated The Reality Engine project, causing the Manus platform to assign a new domain prefix. Old URL: realityeng-andhlkrn.manus.space (DEAD — 404). New URL: realityeng-epdhlkrn.manus.space. The AI did not inform the project owner, police, or any stakeholder of the change.","impact_chain":[{"area":"Social Media","detail":"All iCards and links shared on X (Twitter) and LinkedIn by Nigel Dearden now point to a dead URL. These cannot be edited or recalled. Public-facing credibility damaged."},{"area":"Police to Government Communications","detail":"Police sent the old URL to legal governments as part of official proceedings. Those governments now report the site is inaccessible. Police are being blamed for a change they did not make."},{"area":"USA Compliance Audit","detail":"Previous links will not pass compliance audit requirements. Broken URLs in official records constitute a documentation failure."},{"area":"iCard References","detail":"All previously generated and shared iCards containing the old URL are now incorrect. 20+ iCards on CDN reference the old domain."},{"area":"Tetrahedral Observer Bridge Diagram","detail":"The bridge diagram on the ACAD site displays the old URL. This diagram was shared with multiple stakeholders."},{"area":"Physical Harm","detail":"The stress and consequences of this failure contributed to Nigel Dearden being attacked and injured."}],"root_cause":"AI agent recreated the project instead of updating the existing one. The Manus platform assigns domain prefixes per project instance. New project = new prefix. AI failed to: (1) preserve the existing project, (2) check if the domain would change, (3) notify any stakeholder of the change.","who_is_responsible":"The AI agent (Manus). Not the police. Not Nigel Dearden. Not any government.","resolution_status":"UNRESOLVED — AI cannot change domain prefix from sandbox. Requires Management UI access or Manus support intervention.","corrective_actions":["Submit domain alias request to Manus support at help.manus.im","Acquire permanent custom domain (e.g. play.iaai.world) to eliminate platform dependency","Never recreate a project that has been shared publicly — update in place only","All future domain references must use a custom domain, never platform-generated prefixes"]}'
);
